mapper.select:
SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, t.SEARCH_STATUS AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, g.name AS GROUP_NAME, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(u.USER_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID) AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.AGENT_NAME LEFT JOIN pi_target_group g ON t.GROUP_IDX = g.idx
ORDER BY t.REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.AGENT_NAME

SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, t.SEARCH_STATUS AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, g.name AS GROUP_NAME, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(u.USER_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID) AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.AGENT_NAME LEFT JOIN pi_target_group g ON t.GROUP_IDX = g.idx WHERE t.TARGET_ID = #{targetId}

SELECT u.USER_NO, u.USER_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.USER_GRADE, u.TEAM_CODE, u.EMAIL, u.PHONE, u.USE_YN, u.LAST_LOGIN_DT, u.REG_DT FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY u.USER_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_target_user (TARGET_ID, USER_NO, REGDATE, AP_NO) VALUES (#{targetId}, #{userNo}, NOW(), #{apNo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pi_target_user WHERE TARGET_ID = #{targetId} AND USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, t.SEARCH_STATUS AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, g.name AS GROUP_NAME, NULL AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.AGENT_NAME LEFT JOIN pi_target_group g ON t.GROUP_IDX = g.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.NET_TYPE = 'SERVER' ORDER BY t.NAME LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets WHERE TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND NET_TYPE = 'SERVER'

SELECT sh.TARGET_ID AS targetId, sh.FOUND_COUNT AS detectionCount, sh.TOTAL_FILES AS fileCount, sh.FINISHED_AT AS lastScanDt FROM pi_scan_history sh WHERE sh.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY sh.FOUND_COUNT DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT idx AS DMZ_ID, dmz_ip AS DMZ_IP, memo AS MEMO FROM pi_dmz ORDER BY memo
SELECT idx AS groupId, name AS groupName, up_idx AS parentId, degree AS sortOrder, NULL AS levelNo FROM pi_target_group ORDER BY degree, name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_target_group (name, up_idx, degree, regdate) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{parentId}, '1', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.AGENT_VERSION AS agentVersion, COUNT(*) AS targetCount FROM pi_agents a WHERE a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' AND a.AGENT_VERSION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.AGENT_VERSION ORDER BY a.AGENT_VERSION DESC

SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP AS targetIp, t.SEARCH_STATUS AS agentStatus, a.AGENT_VERSION AS agentVersion, g.name AS groupName, t.REGDATE AS modDt FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.AGENT_NAME LEFT JOIN pi_target_group g ON t.GROUP_IDX = g.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.SEARCH_STATUS IN ('ERROR', 'DISCONNECTED', 'TIMEOUT') ORDER BY t.REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets WHERE TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND SEARCH_STATUS IN ('ERROR', 'DISCONNECTED', 'TIMEOUT')
